title: ACF Field Group Location Rule
description: ACF Field Group location rules tell ACF which posts/pages/users a field group attaches to. Compose multiple rules via the AND-of-OR nested array in acf.schema.json's `location` property. Param enum mirrors ACF Pro's class-acf-location-types.php.

param.description: The location axis (post_type, post_template, taxonomy, etc.)

operator.description: How to compare the param against the value. Equality, negation, pattern matching, substring.

value.description: The value to compare. String form even for numeric IDs — ACF Pro serialises everything as strings.
